# Frozen baseline: UI files in lib/**/{screens,widgets,view,views}/**
# that import the service layer directly, bypassing BLoC. Generated by
# scripts/check_ui_service_boundary.sh. The baseline may only SHRINK
# (growth fails CI vs origin/main). A trailing '# reason' marks intent.
